_doc: Canonical investable universe — human-maintained, version-controlled. EODHD INDX endpoints drift (SMI stale composition, SX5E missing Italian .MI names, SP100 double-counts GOOG+GOOGL). This file is the SOURCE OF TRUTH for index membership; sync-index-constituents.ts unions it with EODHD and logs divergence. Update on rebalance (SMI annually, SX5E annually, SP100/500 quarterly). When the integration test fails, this is what to edit.

SMI.note: EODHD SSMI.INDX returns a ~2017 snapshot (18 names) with rotated-out members (ADEN, BAER, SCMN, UHR) and missing current members (ALC, HOLN, KNIN, LOGN, PGHN, SOON). Canonical list overrides.

SP100.note: EODHD OEX.INDX returns 101 (both GOOG Class C + GOOGL Class A). SP100 methodology counts dual-class issuers once — drop GOOG, keep GOOGL (voting class).

addToEodhd.note: Ferrari — Milan primary (RACE.MI), NYSE dual-listed. EODHD catalogs only the US leg.
Stellantis — NYSE primary for US data, Milan leg STLAM.MI not catalogued by EODHD.
Borsa Italiana absent from EODHD exchanges-list; no US dual-listing with meaningful liquidity. Skipped by screener; roster member for completeness.
Same catalog gap as ENEL.MI. US ADR E.US exists but has different ISIN and lower liquidity.
Intesa Sanpaolo — same catalog gap. ADR ISNPY trades OTC only, not suitable.

EUROSTOXX50.note: EODHD SX5E.INDX returns 48; Borsa Italiana not in /exchanges-list so 5 .MI names (ENEL, ENI, ISP, RACE, STLAM) return null fundamentals. RACE/STLA added via US dual-listings (scrapeable); ENEL/ENI/ISP stay as roster-only with scrapeable=false.

SP500.note: S&P 500 has 500 companies but ~503-505 issues (dual-class: GOOG/GOOGL, FOX/FOXA, NWS/NWSA, BF.A/BF.B). EODHD GSPC.INDX returns 503 — within tolerance. Full roster too large to hand-maintain; trust EODHD for SP500 and gate on count range.
